I'm not certain if these are Interior Live Oaks. But these 4 were dropping lots of acorns in Dec 2023! I collected some to make into acorn flour. Make sure you learn the method of processing them to reach out the Tannins. DO NOT EAT RAW. Access: Public.

This is my favorite oak in Tower to forage acorns from! It's a massive tree! I'm estimating 60+ years old. I'm 2023 the acorns started falling in late November. When writing this I am harvesting more and it is late December 2023. Access: Public.
